channel.title: Tachadol Robotics Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content on Tachadol Robotics Portfolio

item.title: Compliant Tactile Fingertip with Underactuated Cam-Driven Active Pinching
item.description: A smart fingertip retrofit that uses underactuated cam-driven flexure to improve grasping of slippery and soft objects.

item.title: Tanuki: Scalable End-effector Platform for Fine Manipulation with the Ability to Use Tools
item.description: A scalable end-effector platform for fine manipulation and tool-use workflows in gastronomy robotics applications.

item.title: Jamming-Based Stiffness-Adjustable Wheel on Soft Terrain
item.description: Master’s research on a stiffness-adjustable wheel using jamming mechanisms for improved soft-terrain mobility.

item.title: About
item.description:
I am a mechatronics and robotics engineer currently based in Tokyo, focused on building robotic systems that work outside the lab.

Current Role

At Sony AI, I develop compliant robotic grippers with tactile sensing for delicate manipulation in gastronomy-focused applications. My work covers concept, CAD, prototyping, integration, and field-ready operation.

Focus Areas

  • Compliant gripper and tool design
  • Hardware-software integration for robotic systems
  • Electrical systems setup and safety architecture
  • Adaptive mechanisms for locomotion and manipulation

Engineering Approach

I work iteratively with rapid prototypes, test-driven mechanical improvements, and clear cross-functional communication between software, hardware, and operations teams.

item.title: CV
item.description:
Contact

  • Email: Tachadol.su@gmail.com
  • Phone: (+81)80-4834-3708
  • LinkedIn: tachadol-suthisomboon-213182140
  • Google Scholar: Profile

Professional Summary

Robotics and Mechatronics Engineer with 5+ years of combined experience in academic research and industry R&D. Experienced in designing grippers, tactile sensing systems, robotic tools, robotic arms, mobile robots, and adaptive robotic mechanisms. Proficient in CAD/CAE, machine design, compliant mechanisms, and robotics electrical integration, with a strong record of cross-disciplinary execution.

Experience

Sony AI, Tokyo, Japan

Mechatronics Engineer | Dec 2023 - Present
